result.markdown:
# Preface  {.unnumbered}

To run this reprex, you _should_ only need: 


::: {.cell layout-align="center"}

```{.r .cell-code}
pak::pak(
  c("glue", "gt", "gtExtras", "knitr", "patchwork", "scales", "sessioninfo",
    "tidymodels")
)
```
:::


## Computing Notes {.unnumbered}



[Quarto](https://quarto.org/) was used to compile and render the materials


::: {.cell layout-align="center"}


[R version 4.4.2 (2024-10-31)](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/R_(programming_language)) was used for the majority of the computations. [torch](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Torch_(machine_learning)) 2.5.1 was also used. The versions of the primary R modeling and visualization packages used here are:
